response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has impressive full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and cloud technologies, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, her AI/GenAI-specific experience is limited to agentic workflows and MCP, with no direct evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent systems using frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Her resume also lacks explicit cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) and AI system deployment experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering with TypeScript and Node.js, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work
Proven leadership in technical projects and mentorship (e.g., organizing workshops, TDD practices)
Diverse language/tooling experience (DLang, Java, Python, etc.) indicating adaptability
concerns: Limited direct experience with GenAI core technologies (RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks)
No clear evidence of cloud platform specialization (AWS/GCP/Azure) despite required experience
AI-specific experience appears more focused on infrastructure than solution architecture
